name: Moghul Vegetable Curry
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Diced mixed vegetables (carrots, potatoes, beans, peas)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place almonds, cloves, cardamom, fenugreek seeds, cinnamon, garlic, chilli powder, and turmeric in a container of electric blender with enough hot water to enable blades to move freely. Blend to a paste on high speed, then remove contents and set aside.
2. Heat ghee in a saucepan and fry onion until soft and golden. Stir in the paste and fry until it smells fragrant and ghee comes to the surface.
3. Add saffron powder, mixed vegetables, and yoghurt. Stir well.
4. Add salt and water, then bring to boil. Cover and simmer until vegetables are tender.
